attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_MTL_MANUFACTURERS.MANUFACTURER_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_MANUFACTURERS.MANUFACTURER_NAME, STG_CG1_MTL_MANUFACTURERS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_MANUFACTURERS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_MTL_MANUFACTURERS.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_MANUFACTURERS.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_MTL_MANUFACTURERS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_MTL_MANUFACTURERS.DESCRIPTION, STG_CG1_MTL_MANUFACTURERS.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CG1_MTL_MANUFACTURERS.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_MTL_MANUFACTURERS.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_MTL_MANUFACTURERS.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_MTL_MANUFACTURERS.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_MTL_MANUFACTURERS.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_MTL_MANUFACTURERS.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_MTL_MANUFACTURERS.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_MTL_MANUFACTURERS.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_MTL_MANUFACTURERS.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_MTL_MANUFACTURERS.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_MTL_MANUFACTURERS.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_MTL_MANUFACTURERS.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_MTL_MANUFACTURERS.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_MTL_MANUFACTURERS.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_MTL_MANUFACTURERS.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_MTL_MANUFACTURERS.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_MANUFACTURERS.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_MANUFACTURERS.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_MANUFACTURERS.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_MANUFACTURERS.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_MTL_MANUFACTURERS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_MTL_MANUFACTURERS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_MTL_MANUFACTURERS.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_MTL_MANUFACTURERS.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_MTL_MANUFACTURERS STG_CG1_MTL_MANUFACTURERS,
 (
 select MANUFACTURER_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_MTL_MANUFACTURERS
 minus
 select MANUFACTURER_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_MTL_MANUFACTURERS
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.MANUFACTURER_ID = STG_CG1_MTL_MANUFACTURERS.MANUFACTURER_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_MTL_MANUFACTURERS.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_MTL_MANUFACTURERS)
